stemHtml: Which of the following messages could represent a pilot report from an aircraft during the departure phase?

options.a: LPPR Airport, WS WRNG 1 160520 VALID 160520/161200 WS ALL RWY FCST
options.b: EDDM Airport, WS WRNG 1 160520 MBST APCH RWY08 REP AT 0500 A320 35KT LOSS 1NM FNA
options.c: LPPT Airport, WS WRNG 1 160520 MBST IN CLIMB OUT RWY21 REP AT 0500 A320
options.d: EDDB Airport, WS WRNG 1 160520 VALID 160520/161200 WS RWY24 FCST
